mapper.select: select id, template_id, chapter_id, rule_code, rule_name, rule_type, target_table, target_field, target_path, rule_expression, cast(rule_expression_json as char) as rule_expression_json, severity, error_message, remediation_hint, bind_quality_rule_id, apply_object_type, supply_mode_scope, key_part_scope, required_flag, enabled_flag, sort_order, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from t1_dossier_template_rule where template_id = #{templateId} order by sort_order asc, created_at asc
mapper.insert:
insert into t1_dossier_template_rule (id, template_id, chapter_id, rule_code, rule_name, rule_type, target_table, target_field, target_path, rule_expression, rule_expression_json, severity, error_message, remediation_hint, bind_quality_rule_id, apply_object_type, supply_mode_scope, key_part_scope, required_flag, enabled_flag, sort_order, created_by, updated_by) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.templateId}, #{item.chapterId}, #{item.ruleCode}, #{item.ruleName}, #{item.ruleType}, #{item.targetTable}, #{item.targetField}, #{item.targetPath}, #{item.ruleExpression}, #{item.ruleExpressionJson}, #{item.severity}, #{item.errorMessage}, #{item.remediationHint}, #{item.bindQualityRuleId}, #{item.applyObjectType}, #{item.supplyModeScope}, #{item.keyPartScope}, #{item.requiredFlag}, #{item.enabledFlag}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
delete from t1_dossier_template_rule where template_id in
#{templateId}
